questions.question: Explain the difference between using execSQL() and insert() methods for database operations
expectedPoints: execSQL() executes raw SQL statements directly
insert() uses ContentValues for type-safe operations
execSQL() is more flexible but prone to SQL injection if misused
insert() is safer but limited to simple operations

questions.question: Describe the complete process of implementing CRUD operations in an Android application using SQLite, including best practices
expectedPoints: Use proper methods for each CRUD operation
Handle Cursor objects correctly and close them
Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
Integrate with Android components following lifecycle rules
